reviews.review_title: epic game plus a few suggestions
reviews.review_description: wow! amazing game and good music. even though its a WIP its really done well for a couple of days in development. a few suggestions are make tunnels to maps so you cant see or get out of the map also make a way to tag and if you need help with any scripts or help developing I can help. lastly I would love to join your discord if you have one!

this game has helped me a lot to socialize and talk with others, I've made lots of friends and has been great fun to play, I've been playing for about a year and play daily . This games owners and mods are so nice, kind and funny which makes you play the game over and over again, the owner works hard on the game and hasn't have up on it and always tryes to find a solution, this game is great(download now) play it!
